response.justification: Bogdan brings 17+ years of broad software engineering experience and recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure at Naver, which shows technical curiosity. However, the role demands a director-level individual contributor with deep, established AI expertise, cloud platform strategy experience, and a track record of advising strategic customers — none of which are demonstrated in this resume. His background is predominantly hands-on product engineering, his AI work is recent and narrow (MCP tooling), and he lacks the advanced degree, thought leadership profile, or strategic advisory experience the position requires.
strengths: 17+ years of diverse engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure — meets the minimum experience threshold
Current role at Naver includes AI-agent infrastructure and MCP framework work, showing early alignment with the AI tooling space
History of community engagement through talks and workshops demonstrates some ability to share technical knowledge externally
concerns: No advanced degree (Master's/PhD) in an AI-related field and no demonstrated research or recognized thought leadership in AI
AI involvement is shallow and very recent (~14 months); no evidence of having built AI-powered products or platforms at scale
Role is director-level IC focused on cloud/AI strategy and customer advisory — candidate's entire career is hands-on individual engineering with no strategic or advisory track record
